stemHtml: According to OPS regulations, an operator must select a take-off alternate…

options.a: if it would not be possible to return to the aerodrome of departure for meteorological or performance reasons.
options.b: when conducting a flight over water of more than 2 hours or 400 NM, whichever is the lesser.
options.c: when the flight duration exceeds 6 hours.
options.d: for an IFR flight with a single-engine aeroplane.
